response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Reference JSON lyrics were null, so I transcribed the vocals directly from the audio. 2. Audio phonetically matches the song 'フレーフレーLOVE' by Tokino Sora. 3. No vocals were detected during the first 04:45 of the video (which contains only instrumental music and static fan message slides), so no subtitles are provided for that segment as per the 'WHEN' rule. 4. Subtitles start precisely at 04:45.600 with the vocal onset. 5. The fast-paced vocal line was split into logical segments to adhere to character limits while maintaining contiguous timestamps to prevent the 'traffic jam' effect.

subtitles.original: 君のこと 大好き 大好き 大好き
